title: SESSION_RESUME checkpoint
description: Written by tap:run after each wave boundary. Enables resumption of interrupted sessions.

version.description: Schema version. Always 1 for this format.

ticket_slug.description: Slug of the ticket being executed.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run started.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last checkpoint write.

total_waves.description: Total number of waves inferred during planning.

completed_waves.description: Number of waves fully completed (all tasks in wave finished or saga-isolated).

id.description: Task identifier matching the task-NN-name convention.

wave.description: Zero-indexed wave this task belongs to.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the task.

last_phase.description: Last phase that produced a commit for this task. Null if pending.

commit_sha.description: Short SHA of the last commit for this task. Null if pending.

active_worktrees.description: Paths to worktrees created for this run. Used for cleanup on fresh restart.

debugger_retries.description: Record of debugger retries during the session, preserved for retro analysis.
